message:
fix: DocsNavbar GitHub dropdown links to docs repo

Update GitHub dropdown in DocsNavbar to:
- Fetch stats from kubestellar/docs instead of kubestellar/kubestellar
- Star/Fork/Watch links point to kubestellar/docs
- Mobile menu GitHub link points to kubestellar/docs

This only affects kubestellar.io/docs, not the main site.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
